name: Fortune Lady Light
name_jp: フォーチュンレディ・ライティー
desc: This card's ATK/DEF become its Level x 200. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Increase this card's Level by 1 (max. 12). When this face-up card leaves the field by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Fortune Lady" monster from your Deck.
mnst_eff: This card's ATK/DEF become its Level x 200. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Increase this card's Level by 1 (max. 12). When this face-up card leaves the field by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Fortune Lady" monster from your Deck.
eff: This card's ATK/DEF become its Level x 200. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Increase this card's Level by 1 (max. 12). When this face-up card leaves the field by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Fortune Lady" monster from your Deck.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
